name: Quick & Easy Microwave White Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6.5 oz Can of chopped or minced clams with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart casserole dish, microwave cream cheese for 1 minute on high to melt.
2. Add the whole can of clams and liquid, and mix together.
3. Add the lemon pepper, garlic, parsley, and parmesan, and mix together.
4. Return to the microwave and microwave an additional 2-3 minutes until heated through.
5. Adjust seasonings to taste, and add other herbs if desired.
6. Serve over cooked pasta.
This is a great emergency meal recipe because it's so quick and easy to make, but it tastes really good!
